review_budget.sequence_rule: the selected agreeing round is R11 or every earlier R11-through-predecessor result exactly equals one review_history record, reopens at its fixed digest, contains each of that record's seven reviewed-binding lines once, and ends REVISE; skipped rounds, stale bindings, a prior AGREE, R15+, duplicate verdicts, unregistered earlier results, or a later recovery result are forbidden

entry_bootstrap_profile.only_parameter: --agreeing-plan-review-ref followed by one exact R11-R14 result ref; abbreviations, equal-sign form, repeats, positional values, missing or extra tokens are forbidden
entry_bootstrap_profile.failure_rule: reject a pre-existing p02r2 phase root before reading mutable inputs; before first mkdir fail without write; after any phase-root mkdir, no-replace, reopen, or scope-reconstruction failure preserve partial state and forbid retry without human recovery

profile_patch.expected_base_value: each field is 1 only for exact compact-oracle equality, 0 otherwise; unavailable or not source-mappable is 0
profile_patch.replacement: current fields are 1 only for exact compact/materialized/source equality; specialist diagnostic observations are populated only from bound specialist raw output, unobserved fields are null rather than zero, and promotional fields require valid_source_mappable status

profile_patch.expected_base_value: compare seven-bit vectors lexicographically in priority order; a specialist is materially better only when it has 1 at the first differing field where current has 0 and every higher-priority field is equal; equal vectors retain current; no scalar sum, label count, parse success, output size, or runtime tie-breaker
profile_patch.replacement: only valid_source_mappable specialists with independent raw provenance for every claimed leading-prefix field enter lexicographic comparison; diagnostic-only observations may veto a genuine contradiction but cannot promote; frozen identities never rewrite in place and proxy metrics never break ties

profile_patch.expected_base_value: any specialist/current ownership disagreement, non-source-mappable output, malformed output, timeout, nonzero exit, executable/version mismatch, argv/environment mismatch, missing raw artifact, or mutation of a source makes the reviewed case inconclusive or ambiguous and cannot promote a parser
profile_patch.replacement: current reconstruction drift, missing or mismatched invocation/raw evidence, source mutation, unclassified capability, limitation promoted or omitted, claimed field without independent provenance, valid independent contradiction, or unjustified selection is a phase veto; correctly classified specialist limitation alone blocks that specialist but does not refute exact current reconstruction

profile_patch.expected_base_value: parser profile or comparison reports executable/version/argv/environment/source/output mismatch, timeout/nonzero/malformed result, ownership disagreement, or unjustified selection
profile_patch.replacement: current compact/materialized/source drift; missing, duplicate, unreviewed, or mismatched invocation/raw artifact; source mutation; unclassified capability; limitation omitted or promoted; claimed observation without independent provenance; valid specialist contradiction on an independently observed field; frozen identity rewrite; or unjustified specialist selection

parser_capability_contract.primary_current_rule: all reviewed current-parser obligations and all seven fidelity fields must equal the compact/materialized/source reconstruction; any mismatch is a veto
parser_capability_contract.independence_rule: a specialist raw observation is the document-wide structural label set derived only from that specialist's bound raw output/log plus fixed invocation metadata; current-scanner output and compact/materialized requested labels or source spans are forbidden extractor inputs; the requested-label projection enters only in the later comparison

pure_extractor_module_contract.creation_boundary: the module must be absent through the one-shot P02R2 entry snapshot and may be created only as a post-entry implementation artifact on the reviewed effective allowlist
pure_extractor_module_contract.module_body_rule: the decoded strict-UTF-8 module AST has exactly the ordered imports and two function definitions above; no docstring, assignment, annotated assignment, expression, import-from, star import, project import, relative import, conditional import, try-import, module data, data loading, or import-time call is permitted
pure_extractor_module_contract.function_shape_rule: each registered function is synchronous and top-level with exactly its positional parameters, no positional-only or keyword-only parameters, varargs, kwargs, decorators, defaults, keyword defaults, return annotation, parameter annotations, type comments, nested function/class, lambda, comprehension, generator, yield, async, global, or nonlocal statement
pure_extractor_module_contract.store_target_rule: inside each function every Store context is a lexical-local Name or a tuple/list recursively containing only lexical-local Names; Attribute, Subscript, Starred, imported-name, referenced-global, referenced-builtin, and any Del target are forbidden, including in assignment, augmented assignment, annotated assignment, for targets, exception targets, and named expressions
pure_extractor_module_contract.module_global_rule: after loading the statically accepted bytes, the module namespace has exactly __builtins__, __cached__, __doc__, __file__, __loader__, __name__, __package__, __spec__, json, re, ET, and the two registered function names; __doc__ is None; __builtins__ is the runtime builtins dictionary; json, re, and ET are the exact imported standard-library modules with non-workspace origins; each registered imported attribute resolves from its named module with its expected standard-library __module__; each function __globals__ is this exact module namespace; no other module data or preloaded project/current/oracle/source binding is present
pure_extractor_module_contract.static_name_and_call_rule: for each function, lexical locals are its parameters and names admitted by store_target_rule; every loaded nonlocal Name is exactly one registered referenced_global or referenced_builtin; every Attribute load is exactly a registered imported_attribute_allowlist chain, registered non-dunder value_attribute_read_allowlist name, or the receiver of a registered non-dunder value-method call; every call is exactly a registered builtin name, registered imported dotted callable, or registered value-method name; dunder attributes and calls through subscripts, call results, aliases, default values, decorators, unregistered attributes, or unregistered local/helper callables are forbidden
pure_extractor_module_contract.runtime_function_rule: after loading only the already statically accepted module bytes, each registry name resolves to type FunctionType, __module__ is mathdevmcp.parser_capability_extractors, __name__ and __qualname__ equal the registered function name, __closure__ is None, __defaults__ is None, __kwdefaults__ is None, __annotations__ is the exact empty dict, co_freevars and co_cellvars are empty tuples, and inspect.signature exposes only the registered positional parameters

p02r2_latexml_structural_label_set_v1.observed_value_schema: sorted unique strict-UTF-8 document-wide label strings collected only from structurally parsed LaTeXML labels attributes after malformed checks pass; remove exactly one leading LABEL: token; reject malformed XML, duplicate label attributes, invalid strings, ERROR elements, or Error:/undefined-environment diagnostics; the extractor does not know or filter to requested labels

p02r2_pandoc_math_label_set_v1.observed_value_schema: sorted unique strict-UTF-8 document-wide explicit label values parsed from LaTeX label tokens inside Pandoc Math payload strings after strict JSON structure validation; reject duplicate label tokens, malformed JSON, wrong node shapes, or non-string math payloads; the extractor does not know or filter to requested labels

parser_capability_contract.extractor_execution_rule: governance first verifies the pure_extractor_module_contract against strict-UTF-8 module bytes bound by the round implementation manifest, then loads only those accepted bytes and verifies the runtime function closure; it reopens every raw input and its canonical raw invocation receipt no-follow, validates the exact raw_input_entry_schema and receipt artifact-field binding, and passes only those bytes positionally in registry order; the raw-only return must satisfy raw_extractor_output_schema; any module/import/global/closure/AST/call/signature/digest/input/receipt/output mismatch or forbidden lineage is a veto

raw_artifact_binding_schema.binding_rule: ref is the exact expected path below the validated result-round parser root; when present is true it is a regular no-follow file whose reopened bytes exactly match non-null sha256 and byte_count; when present is false the path is absent no-follow and sha256 and byte_count are both null; stdout and stderr are always captured as present files, while output/log presence is measured rather than inferred

source_invocation_receipt_schema.binding_rule: receipt bytes are strict P01-canonical JSON at the fixed ref; BACKEND and CASE equal backend and SHA-256(source_ref); argv, environment, timeout, source allowlist, executable, version receipt, and all raw artifact bindings reconstruct from the exact profile; output equals the LaTeXML XML artifact for latexml and exactly equals stdout for pandoc; log is the LaTeXML log binding for latexml and null for pandoc; source before/after mismatch is a veto; the receipt contains no expected label/value/span, current-parser output, extractor result, comparison, capability conclusion, oracle object, or observation provenance

raw_input_entry_schema.array_rule: raw_inputs is a JSON array with exactly one entry per registry input_roles item in that exact order; role, value_type, and the parallel input_receipt_artifact_fields item equal the registry values at the same index; duplicate roles, refs, or registry omissions are forbidden
raw_input_entry_schema.artifact_rule: artifact_ref is a regular no-follow file below the same validated result-round parser root, and reopened bytes exactly match artifact_sha256 and artifact_byte_count
raw_input_entry_schema.invocation_receipt_rule: every entry for one observation names the same regular no-follow receipt satisfying source_invocation_receipt_schema; its digest equals invocation_receipt_sha256, and the registry input_receipt_artifact_fields item names a receipt raw-artifact binding whose present is true and whose ref, sha256, and byte_count exactly equal artifact_ref, artifact_sha256, and artifact_byte_count in this entry

raw_extractor_output_schema.value_rule: raw_observable_field equals the registry field; observed_value is the document-wide sorted-unique-by-UTF8 array of strict structural label strings derived only from the ordered reopened raw input bytes; requested labels, expected values, filtering to an expected subset, and comparison booleans are forbidden output fields

expected_value_projection_schema.projection_rule: governance writes no-replace P01-canonical bytes at the fixed ref only after every raw invocation receipt and raw-only extractor output for the source case is sealed; CASE is SHA-256(source_ref); values come only from the frozen compact/materialized label projection for exactly that source case; expected_value is sorted unique by UTF-8, source_ref/source_sha256 reopen against the frozen allowlist, and no span, ownership, environment, current output, specialist output, or comparison field is present

parser_capability_contract.comparison_rule: after raw-only extraction, governance independently reopens the canonical requested-label projection for that source case and applies p02r2_requested_label_coverage_comparison_v1: matched_requested_value is the sorted intersection of projection.expected_value and raw_output.observed_value, missing_requested_value is the sorted expected-minus-raw set, unscoped_extra_value is the sorted raw-minus-expected set, and matches_expected is true exactly when missing_requested_value is empty and matched_requested_value equals expected_value; unscoped extras are explanatory and never contradictions or promotion evidence; expected spans, row ownership, current output, and oracle paths are not comparison inputs; raw observation provenance and requested-value comparison provenance are separate exact objects

real_document_label_scope_audit.audit_rule: entry bootstrap and production governance strict-decode each bound source, compute the distinct regex label-token set without using current-parser output, derive the requested-label set only from the frozen compact/materialized projection, require requested labels to be a subset, and reproduce every exact count; this audit establishes that raw document-label equality to the requested projection is invalid, but source-token extras are not specialist observations and are never promotion or contradiction evidence

record_contract.diagnostic_observations: exact object whose keys are a subset of observable_fields and whose values have exact type bool; its ordered keys exactly equal observation_provenance and comparison_provenance keys, and every value equals the corresponding comparison_provenance.matches_expected

observation_provenance_schema.binding_rule: extractor_id is registered for the record backend; module ref equals the registry and pure-module ref; module digest equals the reopened round implementation manifest; raw_inputs and raw_output satisfy their exact schemas; forbidden_lineage is exactly []; no expected value, comparison result, source bytes, current record, oracle object, path handle, callable, or unregistered field is present

comparison_provenance_schema.binding_rule: raw_observed_value exactly equals the separately validated document-wide raw_output.observed_value; expected_value_ref is a regular no-follow canonical projection satisfying expected_value_projection_schema for the same source case, its reopened digest equals expected_value_sha256, and expected_value equals that requested projection; matched/missing/unscoped-extra arrays reconstruct by exact set intersection and differences and are sorted unique by UTF-8; matches_expected is true exactly when missing is empty and matched equals expected, regardless of unscoped extras; no extractor id, raw input, current-parser value, span, ownership, or environment field is present

record_contract.promotional_fields: ordered leading prefix of observable_fields, nonempty only for valid_source_mappable, with the same values and provenance as diagnostic_observations
record_contract.contradictions: ordered subset of diagnostic_observations whose independently observed value is false against the frozen expected true field; any nonempty contradictions list sets the parser veto
record_contract.eligible_for_selection: true only for valid_source_mappable with a nonempty valid promotional_fields prefix, no contradiction, exact invocation/source/version evidence, and no limitation

parser_capability_contract.status_field_rules: source_mutated through malformed_output require a matching nonempty limitation and have empty promotional_fields; malformed_output has no diagnostic observations from malformed content; valid_not_source_mappable has at least one limitation, may carry independently supported diagnostic observations, has empty promotional_fields, and is never eligible; valid_source_mappable has no limitation, has a nonempty leading promotional prefix, and is eligible only when contradictions is empty
parser_capability_contract.malformed_rule: LaTeXML Error nodes, Error log diagnostics, undefined environments or target-affecting macros, absent output, or structurally collapsed label ownership classify malformed_output even when exit code is zero
parser_capability_contract.non_source_mappable_rule: valid output without an independent source-byte mapping records valid_not_source_mappable, an empty promotional field set, explicit limitations, and eligible_for_selection false
parser_capability_contract.limitation_boundary: correctly classified malformed or non-source-mappable specialist output is explanatory, blocks that specialist's promotion, and does not by itself veto an independently exact current reconstruction
parser_capability_contract.contradiction_rule: a contradiction is phase-vetoing only when a structurally valid specialist observation is missing one or more requested labels under the exact coverage comparison for a declared observable field; document-wide unscoped extra labels are explanatory and never contradictory; valid_not_source_mappable may expose this diagnostic requested-label coverage contradiction, while malformed content exposes no observation; bare substring presence, exit zero, counts, size, runtime, and oracle/current-derived extractor filtering cannot establish contradiction
parser_capability_contract.selection_rule: only valid_source_mappable records with raw provenance for every claimed field enter lexicographic comparison; frozen identities are never rewritten in place and materially better evidence requires a new reviewed oracle

downstream_binding_contract.inherited_reviewed_plan_fields: bind entry.recovery_plan_ref and entry.recovery_plan_sha256 in init_round bindings, phase result, run manifest plan_ref/plan_sha256, candidate reviewed_plan fields, round close transitive reconstruction, final reconstruction, and stable reconstruction
downstream_binding_contract.inherited_reviewed_compact_oracle_fields: bind entry.recovery_oracle_ref and entry.recovery_oracle_sha256 in init_round bindings, phase result, candidate reviewed_compact_oracle fields, round close transitive reconstruction, final reconstruction, and stable reconstruction
downstream_binding_contract.inherited_reviewed_materialized_oracle_f: bind entry.base_materialized_oracle_ref and entry.base_materialized_oracle_sha256 wherever the inherited schema names reviewed_materialized_oracle
downstream_binding_contract.transitive_base_rule: every reconstruction that consumes the recovery oracle revalidates every base_bindings ref/digest and prior-entry four-file tree; copied entry or candidate values are not authority
downstream_binding_contract.forbidden_aliases: base_plan and base_compact_oracle may not populate inherited reviewed_plan or reviewed_compact_oracle fields; recovery plan/oracle may not populate base_* fields
downstream_binding_contract.result_schema_rule: the inherited exact key sets remain unchanged; their reviewed_* names use only this mapping, so no implementation-defined field or omission is permitted
downstream_binding_contract.run_manifest_rule: run_manifest.plan_ref/sha256 binds the recovery plan; recovery oracle and all base bindings remain transitively bound through the entry record, phase result, candidate, and artifact inventory
downstream_binding_contract.candidate_rule: candidate directly binds recovery plan, recovery oracle, frozen materialized oracle, new entry, and all inherited evidence; it verifies base plan/compact/old entry transitively from the reopened recovery oracle
downstream_binding_contract.final_rule: final reconstruction reopens the candidate and recovery oracle and reruns the same direct/transitive binding checks before accepting review or audit

namespace_rule: all formal result-round, stable, guard, parser, bundle, and governance artifacts are below p02r2-20260712 or use the exact revised docs refs; the p02-20260711 tree is protected immutable predecessor evidence and never a pass predecessor
effective_profile_rule: strictly verify all base_bindings, deep-copy the base compact oracle, require every profile_patch expected_base_value at its exact JSON pointer, apply each replacement once, replace the base entry_snapshot_schema and entry_bootstrap_profile with this oracle's entry_schema and entry_bootstrap_profile for entry verification, and use parser_capability_contract for specialist record validation; reject any other effective-profile difference
unchanged_contract: all base compact-oracle values not listed in profile_patch or replaced wholesale by entry_schema, entry_bootstrap_profile, or parser_capability_contract remain exact and authoritative
